languages.text: Блюстители возвращаются с новой информацией. Корабль оказался Имперской тюрьмой, а связавшийся с мостиком человек — ее пленником. Заключенные вырвались и разорвали отряд охраняющих их {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}арбитров{/g}, однако в пылу бунта были перебиты ключевые офицеры мостика и контингент техножрецов. Еда на беспомощно дрейфующем судне закончилась или испортилась, и умирающие бунтовщики теперь согласны на все, лишь бы выбраться из своего склепа.

The enforcers return with new information. The ship turned out to be an Imperium jail, and the man who had contacted the bridge was a prisoner. The convicts had broken free and massacred the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}Arbitrator{/g} squad guarding them; however, in the heat of battle, several crucial bridge officers and a Tech-Priest contingent were killed as well. The ship has been drifting helplessly ever since, and what little food remains has gone bad. The dying rioters would now agree to anything if it helped them get out of their flying crypt.

Заключенные вырвались и разорвали отряд охраняющих их {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}арбитров{/g}, однако в пылу бунта были перебиты ключевые офицеры мостика и контингент техножрецов. Еда на беспомощно дрейфующем судне закончилась или испортилась, и умирающие бунтовщики теперь согласны на все, лишь бы выбраться из своего склепа.

traits.locale_text: The enforcers return with new information. The ship turned out to be an Imperium jail, and the man who had contacted the bridge was a prisoner. The convicts had broken free and massacred the Arbitrator squad that guarded them; however, in the heat of battle, critically important bridge officers and a Tech-Priest contingent were killed as well. The ship has been drifting helplessly. What little food remained has gone bad. The dying rioters would now agree to anything if it helps them get out of their flying crypt.

The enforcers return with new information. The ship turned out to be an Imperium jail, and the man who had contacted the bridge was a prisoner. The convicts had broken free and massacred the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}Arbitrator{/g} squad guarding them; however, in the heat of battle, several crucial bridge officers and a Tech-Priest contingent were killed as well. The ship has been drifting helplessly ever since, and what little food remains has gone bad. The dying rioters would now agree to anything if it helped them get out of their flying crypt.

languages.text: Die Enforcer kehren mit neuen Informationen zurück. Das Schiff hat sich als imperiales Gefängnis entpuppt. Der Mann, der die Brücke kontaktiert hat, war ein Gefangener. Die Verurteilten hatten sich befreit und die {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}Arbitratoren{/g} getötet, die sie bewachen sollten. Im Eifer des Gefechts wurden jedoch auch mehrere essenzielle Brückenoffiziere und ein Techpriester-Kontingent getötet. Seitdem treibt das Schiff hilflos durch die Leere, und das bisschen Nahrung, das noch übrig war, ist längst verdorben. Die sterbenden Aufständischen würden jetzt in alles einwilligen, wenn es ihnen hilft, aus ihrer fliegenden Krypta zu entkommen.
languages.original_text: The enforcers return with new information. The ship turned out to be an Imperium jail, and the man who had contacted the bridge was a prisoner. The convicts had broken free and massacred the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}Arbitrator{/g} squad guarding them; however, in the heat of battle, several crucial bridge officers and a Tech-Priest contingent were killed as well. The ship has been drifting helplessly ever since, and what little food remains has gone bad. The dying rioters would now agree to anything if it helped them get out of their flying crypt.

traits.locale_text: Die Enforcer kehren mit neuen Informationen zurück. Das Schiff hat sich als imperiales Gefängnis entpuppt. Der Mann, der die Brücke kontaktiert hat, war ein Gefangener. Die Verurteilten hatten sich befreit und die Arbitratoren getötet, die sie bewachen sollten. Im Eifer des Gefechts wurden jedoch auch mehrere essenzielle Brückenoffiziere und ein Techpriester-Kontingent getötet. Seitdem treibt das Schiff hilflos durch die Leere, und das bisschen Nahrung, das noch übrig war, ist längst verdorben. Die sterbenden Aufständischen würden jetzt in alles einwilligen, wenn es ihnen hilft, aus ihrer fliegenden Krypta zu entkommen.

languages.text: À leur retour, les prévôts vous révèlent ce qu'ils ont appris. Le vaisseau est en fait une prison impériale et l'homme qui a contacté la passerelle est l'un des détenus. Les prisonniers ont massacré l'escouade d'{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}arbitrators{/g} qui les gardait après s'être évadés de leurs cellules, mais dans le feu de l'action, plusieurs officiers cruciaux ont péri, ainsi qu'un groupe de technoprêtres. Depuis, le vaisseau erre dans l'espace et le peu de nourriture qui reste est maintenant gâté. Les émeutiers mourants sont prêts à faire n'importe quoi pour que vous les sortiez de leur crypte volante.
languages.original_text: The enforcers return with new information. The ship turned out to be an Imperium jail, and the man who had contacted the bridge was a prisoner. The convicts had broken free and massacred the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}Arbitrator{/g} squad guarding them; however, in the heat of battle, several crucial bridge officers and a Tech-Priest contingent were killed as well. The ship has been drifting helplessly ever since, and what little food remains has gone bad. The dying rioters would now agree to anything if it helped them get out of their flying crypt.

traits.locale_text: À leur retour, les prévôts vous révèlent ce qu'ils ont appris. Le vaisseau est en fait une prison impériale et l'homme qui a contacté la passerelle est l'un des détenus. Les prisonniers ont massacré l'escouade d’arbitrators qui les gardait après s'être évadés de leurs cellules, mais dans le feu de l'action, plusieurs officiers cruciaux ont péri, ainsi qu'un groupe de technoprêtres. Depuis, le vaisseau erre dans l'espace et le peu de nourriture qui reste est maintenant gâté. Les émeutiers mourants sont prêts à faire n'importe quoi pour que vous les sortiez de leur crypte volante.

languages.text: 執行官たちが新たな情報を持って戻ってきた。その船は帝国の監獄船で、ブリッジに連絡をしてきた男は囚人だったことが判明した。囚人たちは脱走し、自分たちを監視していた{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}アービトレイター{/g}部隊を皆殺しにした。しかし戦闘の混乱の中で、数名の重要なブリッジの士官と技術司祭の一団も命を落とした。それ以来その船は無力に漂い続け、わずかに残っていた食料もすでに腐ってしまっている。今や死にかけた暴徒たちは、この空飛ぶ墓場から出られるのなら、どんなことにでも同意するだろう。
languages.original_text: The enforcers return with new information. The ship turned out to be an Imperium jail, and the man who had contacted the bridge was a prisoner. The convicts had broken free and massacred the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}Arbitrator{/g} squad guarding them; however, in the heat of battle, several crucial bridge officers and a Tech-Priest contingent were killed as well. The ship has been drifting helplessly ever since, and what little food remains has gone bad. The dying rioters would now agree to anything if it helped them get out of their flying crypt.

traits.locale_text: 執行官たちが新たな情報を持って戻ってきた。その船は帝国の監獄船で、ブリッジに連絡をしてきた男は囚人だったことが判明した。囚人たちは脱走し、自分たちを監視していたアービトレイター部隊を皆殺しにした。しかし戦闘の混乱の中で、数名の重要なブリッジの士官と技術司祭の一団も命を落とした。それ以来その船は無力に漂い続け、わずかに残っていた食料もすでに腐ってしまっている。今や死にかけた暴徒たちは、この空飛ぶ墓場から出られるのなら、どんなことにでも同意するだろう。

languages.text: El personal de seguridad vuelve con nueva información. La nave ha resultado ser una prisión del Imperium, y el hombre que se había puesto en contacto con el puente era un prisionero. Los presos se habían fugado y exterminado a la escuadra de {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}Arbitrator{/g} que los vigilaba. Sin embargo, durante el fragor de la batalla, varios oficiales esenciales del puente y una unidad de tecnosacerdotes también murieron. La nave lleva a la deriva desde entonces y la poca comida que queda caducó hace tiempo. Los amotinados moribundos aceptarán cualquier cosa con tal de salir de esta cripta volante».
languages.original_text: The enforcers return with new information. The ship turned out to be an Imperium jail, and the man who had contacted the bridge was a prisoner. The convicts had broken free and massacred the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}Arbitrator{/g} squad guarding them; however, in the heat of battle, several crucial bridge officers and a Tech-Priest contingent were killed as well. The ship has been drifting helplessly ever since, and what little food remains has gone bad. The dying rioters would now agree to anything if it helped them get out of their flying crypt.

traits.locale_text: El personal de seguridad vuelve con nueva información. La nave ha resultado ser una prisión del Imperium, y el hombre que se había puesto en contacto con el puente era un prisionero. Los presos se habían fugado y exterminado a la escuadra de Arbitrator que los vigilaba. Sin embargo, durante el fragor de la batalla, varios oficiales esenciales del puente y una unidad de tecnosacerdotes también murieron. La nave lleva a la deriva desde entonces y la poca comida que queda caducó hace tiempo. Los amotinados moribundos aceptarán cualquier cosa con tal de salir de esta cripta volante».

languages.text: 你的执法者带着新的情报回到了船上。原来，这艘船是帝国的监狱船，而刚刚与舰桥联系的人是名囚犯。那些囚犯越狱了，杀光了负责看守的{g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}法务官{/g}小队。然而，在激烈的战斗中，舰桥上几位重要军官与一支技术神甫小队也遭到杀害。在那之后，这艘船就一直在无助地漂流着，仅存的一丁点食物也已经变质了。只要能离开这个飘在空中的棺材，这些奄奄一息的暴徒什么事情都愿意做。
languages.original_text: The enforcers return with new information. The ship turned out to be an Imperium jail, and the man who had contacted the bridge was a prisoner. The convicts had broken free and massacred the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}Arbitrator{/g} squad guarding them; however, in the heat of battle, several crucial bridge officers and a Tech-Priest contingent were killed as well. The ship has been drifting helplessly ever since, and what little food remains has gone bad. The dying rioters would now agree to anything if it helped them get out of their flying crypt.

traits.locale_text: 你的执法者带着新的情报回到了船上。原来，这艘船是帝国的监狱船，而刚刚与舰桥联系的人是名囚犯。那些囚犯越狱了，杀光了负责看守的法务官小队。然而，在激烈的战斗中，舰桥上几位重要军官与一支技术神甫小队也遭到杀害。在那之后，这艘船就一直在无助地漂流着，仅存的一丁点食物也已经变质了。只要能离开这个飘在空中的棺材，这些奄奄一息的暴徒什么事情都愿意做。

languages.text: İnfazcılar, dönüp bilgi veriyor. Geminin bir İmparatorluk hapishanesi olduğu, köprüyle iletişime geçen adamın bir mahkûm olduğu ortaya çıkıyor. Mahkûmlar isyan edip başlarındaki {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}Yargıcı{/g} mangasını katletmişler. Fakat savaşın hararetiyle birkaç önemli köprü subayı ile bir Tekno Rahip birliği de arada kaynamış. Gemi, o zamandan beri çaresizce sürükleniyormuş ve geriye kalan az miktarda yiyecek de bozulmuş. Ölüm döşeğindeki mahkûmlar, uçan mahzenlerinden kurtulmak için her şeye razılar.
languages.original_text: The enforcers return with new information. The ship turned out to be an Imperium jail, and the man who had contacted the bridge was a prisoner. The convicts had broken free and massacred the {g|Encyclopedia:AdeptusArbitesGlossary}Arbitrator{/g} squad guarding them; however, in the heat of battle, several crucial bridge officers and a Tech-Priest contingent were killed as well. The ship has been drifting helplessly ever since, and what little food remains has gone bad. The dying rioters would now agree to anything if it helped them get out of their flying crypt.

traits.locale_text: İnfazcılar, dönüp bilgi veriyor. Geminin bir İmparatorluk hapishanesi olduğu, köprüyle iletişime geçen adamın bir mahkûm olduğu ortaya çıkıyor. Mahkûmlar isyan edip başlarındaki Yargıcı mangasını katletmişler. Fakat savaşın hararetiyle birkaç önemli köprü subayı ile bir Tekno Rahip birliği de arada kaynamış. Gemi, o zamandan beri çaresizce sürükleniyormuş ve geriye kalan az miktarda yiyecek de bozulmuş. Ölüm döşeğindeki mahkûmlar, uçan mahzenlerinden kurtulmak için her şeye razılar.
